name: 季华卫浴
description: 专业生产整体淋浴房、淋浴屏风、等玻璃产品，年产能20万套；自有5万平方米工作场地，100人工作团队，周边配套型材和玻璃工厂，出口欧洲，美国，东南亚等地，为各大电商平台用户提供优质货源
descriptionEn:
We specialize in the production of integrated shower rooms, shower screens and other glass products with an annual production capacity of 200,000 sets.
    We own a 50,000-square-meter production plant and a 100-member workforce. With supporting profile and glass manufacturers in the surrounding areas, our products are exported to Europe, the United States, Southeast Asia and other regions, supplying high-quality goods to sellers on major e-commerce platforms

features.zh: 说明书和产品资料配套提供
features.en: Instructions and product documents are provided as a set.

videos.title: 淋浴房实地安装视频
videos.titleEn: On-site Installation Video of Shower Room

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control

name: 晶洁卫浴
description: 专注于薄边盆的研发与生产，拥有先进的陶瓷生产工艺；自主研发生产陶瓷机器和窑炉，掌握每个陶瓷产品的材料混合比例，优秀的产品给TOTO，高仪等大品牌做过代加工；合作品牌带有CE,CUPC等系列认证；合作多家马桶，智能马桶等产品工厂，强强联合整合供应链，立足于专精薄边盆的市场，建立陶瓷产品工厂直出体系
descriptionEn:
It specializes in the R&D and production of thin-rim basins with advanced ceramic manufacturing technologies. It independently develops and manufactures ceramic processing machinery and kilns, and masters the precise material blending ratios for all ceramic products
    Its premium-quality products have been OEM-manufactured for renowned brands including TOTO and Grohe. Its partnered brands hold certifications such as CE and CUPC.
    The company has established cooperative ties with numerous factories producing conventional and smart toilets. Through strategic alliances and integrated supply chain management, it focuses on the niche thin-rim basin market and has built a direct factory supply system for ceramic products

features.zh: 自主研发窑炉和陶瓷生产机器
features.en: Independently develop kilns and ceramic production machinery

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control

name: 卫之芯厨卫科技
descriptionEn:
We specialize in the R&D and manufacturing of bathroom cabinets with advanced production technologies for such products. We focus on custom-made high-end solid wood and multi-layer board bathroom cabinets, and are capable of continuous mass production for bulk engineering wholesale projects. Our premium products have been OEM-manufactured for renowned brands including TOTO and Grohe.

    Besides standalone bathroom cabinet production, we assist clients with one-stop supporting procurement of matching accessories such as faucets, drainers, overflow pipes and angle stop valves.

    Our partnered brands hold certifications including CE and CUPC. We have built strong alliances with numerous manufacturers of other types of bathroom cabinets and raw material suppliers to integrate the supply chain. Rooted in the niche market of professional customized bathroom cabinets, we have established a direct factory supply system for bathroom cabinet products.

features.en: High-end customization, OEM production for major brands

features.zh: 五年质保，质量保证，还有指导和安装服务
features.en: Five-year warranty, quality assurance, plus guidance and installation services

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control

name: 翔泰陶瓷
description:
我们是集研发、智造、销售为一体的现代化大中型墙地砖生产企业，全线引进国际化智能生产设备，配备300m 超长节能窑炉、7200T 大吨位数控压机、高端湿法球磨机、宽幅同步智能输送系统等成套智能化产线
    工厂统筹全品类瓷砖量产，覆盖通体地砖、墙面砖、仿大理石板材、装饰罗马柱等中高端全系产品，依托全品类配套优势，一站式输出家装、工装整装配套解决方案
    企业先后取得3C 强制性产品认证、ISO9001 质量管理体系、ISO14001 环境管理体系、GB/T28001 职业健康安全管理体系多项权威认证
    深耕绿色智造，环保硬件投入超 1000 万元，年度环保运维支出 700 万元以上，合规稳定承接地产、酒店大批量集采订单
descriptionEn:
We are a modern medium-to-large sized wall and floor tile manufacturer integrating R&D, intelligent manufacturing and sales. We have introduced full-range internationally sourced intelligent production equipment, including complete intelligent production lines equipped with an ultra-long 300-meter energy-saving kiln, 7200-ton large-tonnage numerical control presses, high-end wet ball mills, wide-format synchronous intelligent conveying systems and other supporting facilities.

    Our factory arranges mass production of a full spectrum of ceramic tiles, covering mid-to-high-end full-range products such as full-body floor tiles, wall tiles, imitation marble slabs and decorative Roman columns. Leveraging our full-product matching advantages, we provide one-stop complete supporting solutions for residential decoration and commercial construction projects.

    The enterprise has successively obtained multiple authoritative certifications including China Compulsory Certification (3C), ISO9001 Quality Management System Certification, ISO14001 Environmental Management System Certification and GB/T28001 Occupational Health and Safety Management System Certification.

    Committed to green intelligent manufacturing, we have invested over 10 million RMB in environmental protection hardware, with annual environmental protection operation and maintenance expenses exceeding 7 million RMB, enabling us to legally and steadily undertake bulk centralized procurement orders from real estate developers and hotels.

features.zh: 多个工厂生产整合产品
features.en: Integrated products manufactured by multiple factories
Quality Assurance for Products and Packaging

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control

name: 广顺卫浴
description:
我们是一站式卫浴洁具生产出口企业，拥有3万平方米标准化厂房、130名在职员工，年产能达50万套。

公司自主生产全系列卫浴产品，涵盖亚克力浴缸、户外SPA恒温泡池、干蒸桑拿房、整体淋浴房及便携式淋浴房。

全系产品均通过欧盟CE、美国CUPC及澳洲标准认证，满足多国出口准入要求，常年远销欧美及东南亚各国。

企业支持OEM与ODM定制服务，执行严苛的生产品控体系，可稳定承接整柜海外订单，为全球采购商提供可靠的供货服务。
descriptionEn:
We are a one-stop sanitary ware manufacturer and exporter with our own 30,000 square meters of standardized factory buildings, 130 existing employees and an annual production capacity of 500,000 sets.

We independently manufacture a full range of products including acrylic bathtubs, outdoor SPA hot tubs, dry steam saunas, integrated shower rooms and portable shower rooms.

All our products have obtained CE, CUPC and Australian standard certifications, meeting the export access requirements of numerous countries, and are sold to Europe, America and Southeast Asian countries all year round.

We support OEM & ODM customization, implement strict production quality control, steadily accept full-container overseas orders, and provide reliable supply services for global purchasers.

features.zh: 浴缸，桑拿房等多品类产品工厂生产
features.en: Factory production of multiple product categories including bathtubs and saunas

features.zh: 木箱和纸箱自主生产配套
features.en: Self-produced matching wooden and carton boxes
Custom mold opening and production available

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control

name: 航牌卫浴
description:
我们始于2005年，经过11年的发展与积累，于2016年正式创立，是一家集智能卫生洁具和智能电路控板的开发、生产与销售为一体的综合性现代企业，总部位于享有中国瓷都美誉的广东省潮州市。创立10年来，已成为国内外众多大型卫浴品牌的重点OEM战略合作伙伴，公司产品遍布全国以及世界多个国家与地区

公司秉承“诚信、务实、专业、创新”的核心价值观和“质量为本，信誉为重”的经营理念，以完善的设计、精巧的工艺、严格的产品检测手段以及完善的售后服务，为客户提供品质卓越的卫浴产品。“品质为先，探索不止”是我们的品牌方向。未来，我们将继续不断探索、创新，创造更多优质的产品，振兴中国民族品牌，为广大客户与消费者提供品质卓越的智能卫浴产品，共享现代舒适卫浴生活!
descriptionEn:
We started our journey in 2005 and achieved official establishment in 2016 after 11 years of development and accumulation. We are a comprehensive modern enterprise integrating the development, production and sales of intelligent sanitary ware and intelligent circuit control boards, with our headquarters located in Chaozhou City, Guangdong Province, known as the Porcelain Capital of China. Over the past decade since its founding, the company has become a key OEM strategic partner for numerous large domestic and foreign bathroom brands, with its products sold across China and many countries and regions worldwide.

Adhering to the core values of "Integrity, Pragmatism, Professionalism and Innovation" and the business philosophy of "Quality-oriented, Reputation-prioritized", the company provides customers with high-quality bathroom products through sophisticated design, exquisite craftsmanship, strict product testing methods and comprehensive after-sales service. Our brand tenet is "Quality First, Endless Exploration". In the future, we will keep exploring and innovating to develop more high-quality products, revitalize Chinese national brands, supply superior intelligent bathroom products for customers and consumers, and share a modern and comfortable bathroom life together!

features.zh: 产品全系列测试和检验报告齐全
features.en: Complete test and inspection reports for the full product range are available.
Large annual output and factory scale

factoryStrengthTitleEn: Self-produced at the source with strict quality control
